src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
Update the method signature to throw JacksonException instead of JsonProcessingException to match the new Jackson API.
Remove @EnableWebSecurity annotation which is no longer required in Spring Security 6+ as it is enabled by default.
Update CORS configuration to use the new lambda DSL with withDefaults() instead of the deprecated method.
Update frameOptions configuration to use the new FrameOptionsConfig functional interface style.
Rename permissionsPolicy to permissionsPolicyHeader to align with Spring Security 6 API changes.
Update OAuth2 resource server JWT configuration to use the new lambda DSL with withDefaults().
Remove throws Exception from filterChain method signature as the new lambda DSL does not throw checked exceptions.
Removed the jwtAuthenticationConverter bean definition, likely due to changes in Spring Security OAuth2 resource server configuration or deprecation.
Update import for ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory to the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.
